summary: All three major indexes spent the day inching toward fresh record highs as oil futures seemed to see an end in sight for the Iran war. The Nasdaq Composite Index closed up 0.1% to a new high of 26,674.73 on Wednesday. Today’s market wins were largely driven by the fact that oil futures were hovering at a six-week low on the news that the U.S. and Iran seem to be heading toward a deal to end the conflict and reopen the Strait of Hormuz.

chineseSummary: 由于伊朗战争似乎即将结束，三大股指全天都小幅逼近历史新高。周三纳斯达克综合指数收盘上涨 0.1%，至新高 26,674.73 点。今天的市场上涨主要是由于美国和伊朗似乎即将达成协议以结束冲突并重新开放霍尔木兹海峡的消息导致石油期货徘徊在六周低点。

whyItMatters: 这条信息属于财经市场信号，适合用于观察利率、汇率、股债商品、金融机构和宏观政策变化。
